2026-0295
2026-03-30IRCC, TBFinancial Administration ActFee Paid or Payable for the Acquisition of Permanent Resident Status (Afghanistan) Remission OrderFee Paid or Payable for the Acquisition of Permanent Resident Status (Afghanistan) Remission Order in order to remit the fee that was not collected for certain Afghan nationals whose application for permanent residency was or will be approved under a temporary public policy.N/A
subject: Fee Paid or Payable for the Acquisition of Permanent Resident Status (Afghanistan) Remission Order
precis: Fee Paid or Payable for the Acquisition of Permanent Resident Status (Afghanistan) Remission Order in order to remit the fee that was not collected for certain Afghan nationals whose application for permanent residency was or will be approved under a temporary public policy.
